THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALINGIT, FAYE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3156 SAN JOSE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $3,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, STAYED UNTIL APR-06-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFENDANT VACATES PRIOR TO 9:00 A.M. ON 6 APR 99, PLAINTIFF WILL WAIVE AND FORGIVE THE $3,000.00 DAMAGES, SET ASIDE THE JUDGMENT AND FILE A DISMISSAL.
